items.title_en: New analysis shows EU could significantly cut deforestation footprint with a mix of policy tools

items.title_en: Domestic food crops overlooked as driver of deforestation
items.title_tr: Yerel gıda ürünleri ormansızlaşmanın itici gücü olarak göz ardı ediliyor

items.title_en: Trase uses AI to close the traceability gap in the soy supply chain

items.title_en: Traders exposed to water scarcity risks in Brazilian beef and soy supply chains
